instruction: Three things wrong with the cast icon: the base outline is blue, the small pink dot is cyan (wrong color), AND the small pink dot has drifted out of place. Fix everything.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cast.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #3b82f6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M2 16.1A5 5 0 0 1 5.9 20M2 12.05A9 9 0 0 1 9.95 20M2 8V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-6"/><line x1="2" y1="20" x2="2.01" y2="20"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#06b6d4" cx="106" cy="106" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cast.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M2 16.1A5 5 0 0 1 5.9 20M2 12.05A9 9 0 0 1 9.95 20M2 8V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h16a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v12a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-6"/><line x1="2" y1="20" x2="2.01" y2="20"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#ec4899" cx="112" cy="112" r="2" />
</svg>
